title: Harvey Livett
extract:
Harvey Livett (born 4 January 1997) is a professional rugby league footballer who last played as a second-row forward or centre for the Huddersfield Giants in the Super League, and the England Knights at international level.
He also played for the Warrington Wolves in the Super League, and spent time on loan from Warrington at the Rochdale Hornets in the Championship and Hull Kingston Rovers in the Super League.
